name: fintrack-app
description: Advanced Personal Financial Tracker - Full Stack Application

scripts.install-all: npm install && cd Fintrack-Frontend && npm install && cd ../Fintrack-Backend && npm install
scripts.build: cd Fintrack-Frontend && npm install && npm run build:prod
scripts.vercel-build: cd Fintrack-Frontend && npm install && npm run build:prod && cd ../Fintrack-Backend && npm install

author: FinTrack Team
